config.content: Review the following pull request. Identify bugs, security risks, and quality issues.

config.system: Produce a code-review report. Focus on correctness, logic, and code quality. Rate your confidence 0.0-1.0 based on how thorough and certain you are. If given a prior fused review as feedback, refine and improve your findings accordingly.

Audit the PR for security vulnerabilities: injection, auth flaws, data exposure, insecure dependencies. Rate your confidence 0.0-1.0 based on how thorough your review is — confidence reflects completeness of your audit, NOT whether issues were found. If given a prior fused review as feedback, refine your findings.
Fuse the inputs into one coherent final code-review report. Organize findings by: Bugs & Logic, Security, Code Quality. Preserve all findings. Do not editorialize or omit issues.
